title.zh: 把站点核心内容切到礼部内容仓库
title.en: Moved the site's core content into the Libu content repository

summary.zh: 今天的重点是让智能体、工作流、日志和产品不再依赖在线后台读取，而是由礼部脚本统一生成。
summary.en: Today's focus was to stop loading agents, workflows, journals, and products from an online CMS and let Libu generate them through scripts.

whatWeDid.zh: 梳理了所有仍依赖 Firestore 的展示页面，并确认切换范围。
whatWeDid.en: Audited every showcase page still depending on Firestore and scoped the migration.

whatWeDid.zh: 设计了 `content/agents`、`content/workflows`、`content/logs`、`content/products` 四类内容目录。
把礼部接管方案补成 HTML 报告，放进下载区供后续参考。
whatWeDid.en: Expanded the Libu takeover plan into an HTML report and added it to the download area.

difficulties.zh: 原先的站点逻辑把内容读取和页面结构耦合得比较紧。
difficulties.en: The original site tightly coupled data fetching and page structure.

solutions.zh: 决定先生成一个统一的 `content.generated.ts` 模块，再让页面只负责渲染内容。
solutions.en: We decided to first generate a unified `content.generated.ts` module and then make pages purely responsible for rendering.

outputs.zh: 完成礼部操作系统报告初版。
outputs.en: Finished the first version of the Libu operating system report.
